summary: v22.0.0 Feature Testing COMPLETE. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified. Key features tested: 1) Signal expiry (1-hour) working - signals show ACTIVE only within 1 hour, 2) Auto-trade protection working - auto_exit/auto_entry OFF returns exits_executed:0, new_trades_generated:0, 3) Manual trade entry from Signals tab working with toast notification, 4) Manual trade exit from Active Trades working, 5) News Feed 'Fetch Latest News' button working (no AI), 6) 'Analyze with AI' per article working with toast notification.

issues: 404 errors for favicon.ico - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: === SIGNAL EXPIRY (1-HOUR) VERIFIED ===
VERIFIED: trading.js lines 35-48: GET /api/signals/latest expires signals older than 1 hour
VERIFIED: Code sets status='EXPIRED' for signals where created_at < oneHourAgo
VERIFIED: Only ACTIVE signals returned (filtered by status === 'ACTIVE')
VERIFIED: Current LIVE signals are ~20 mins old, correctly showing as ACTIVE
=== AUTO-TRADE PROTECTION VERIFIED ===
VERIFIED: auto_entry=false, auto_exit=false in settings
VERIFIED: POST /api/auto-exit/check returns exits_executed:0, new_trades_generated:0 when auto_exit=false
VERIFIED: trading.js line 267: Early return when !isAutoExitOn
VERIFIED: news.js lines 173-175: Signal saved but NOT executed when auto_entry OFF
VERIFIED: Frontend shows 'Exit: OFF | Entry: OFF' badge
=== MANUAL TRADE ENTRY VERIFIED ===
VERIFIED: POST /api/trades/execute-signal creates trade in PAPER mode
VERIFIED: SignalsList.js has 'Enter Trade' buttons with data-testid='enter-trade-btn-{idx}'
VERIFIED: Toast notification: 'Trade Entered: PUT NIFTY50 ₹3,900 @ Strike 23000'
VERIFIED: Trade appears in Active Trades tab after entry
=== MANUAL TRADE EXIT VERIFIED ===
VERIFIED: POST /api/trades/manual-exit closes trade with trade_id
VERIFIED: TradesList.js has 'Exit' button with data-testid='manual-exit-btn-{idx}'
VERIFIED: Exit button visible in Active Trades tab
=== NEWS FETCH-ONLY VERIFIED ===
VERIFIED: POST /api/news/fetch-only returns articles with ai_analyzed=false
VERIFIED: news.js lines 263-298: fetch-only endpoint uses keyword analysis only (no API calls)
VERIFIED: NewsFeed.js has 'Fetch Latest News' button with data-testid='fetch-news-only-btn'
VERIFIED: Button text: 'Fetches news without using AI credits. Analyze individual articles below.'
=== NEWS ANALYZE-ARTICLE VERIFIED ===
VERIFIED: POST /api/news/analyze-article analyzes single article with AI
VERIFIED: news.js lines 302-334: analyze-article endpoint runs AI analysis and generates signal if confidence >= 70
VERIFIED: NewsFeed.js has 'Analyze with AI' buttons with data-testid='analyze-article-btn-{idx}'
VERIFIED: Toast notification: 'Analysis Complete - Analysis complete, no signal (low confidence or HOLD)'
VERIFIED: 'AI Analyzed' badge appears after analysis
context_for_next_testing_agent: v22.0.0 Feature Testing COMPLETE. All requested features verified: 1) Signal expiry (1-hour) - trading.js lines 35-48 expires old signals, 2) Auto-trade protection - auto_exit/auto_entry OFF prevents auto trades, 3) Manual trade entry - SignalsList.js 'Enter Trade' buttons work, 4) Manual trade exit - TradesList.js 'Exit' buttons work, 5) News fetch-only - NewsFeed.js 'Fetch Latest News' button fetches without AI, 6) News analyze-article - 'Analyze with AI' buttons analyze single articles. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with Playwright.

signal_expiry_1_hour.description: Signals older than 1 hour are marked EXPIRED
signal_expiry_1_hour.test_result: Current LIVE signals ~20 mins old, correctly showing ACTIVE

auto_trade_protection.description: No auto trades when auto_entry/auto_exit OFF

manual_trade_entry.description: Manual trade entry from Signals tab

manual_trade_exit.description: Manual trade exit from Active Trades

news_analyze_article.test_result: Toast: 'Analysis Complete - Analysis complete, no signal (low confidence or HOLD)'
